scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run build && npm run server:lint && npm run server:typecheck && npm run server:typecheck:test && npm run server:build && npm run server:architecture
scripts.lint: eslint src tests scripts vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts eslint.config.js
scripts.lint:fix: eslint src tests scripts vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts eslint.config.js --fix
scripts.format:frontend:check: prettier src tests scripts public index.html eslint.config.js prettier.config.cjs vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts tsconfig*.json --check
scripts.precommit: npm run lint && npm run format && npm run server:lint
scripts.test:e2e:docker: docker compose -f docker-compose.e2e.yml up --build --force-recreate --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from playwright-e2e postgres-e2e app-e2e playwright-e2e
scripts.test:e2e:docker:ui: docker compose -f docker-compose.e2e.yml --profile ui up --build playwright-e2e-ui
